unit.title: FC-LS Fabric Login / FLOGI
unit.notes: Seed reading plan derived from FLOGI live QA traces. The plan intentionally decomposes the broad FLOGI question into focused, IR-oriented tasks.

task.title: FLOGI relogin, implicit logout, and FLOGI/FDISC/LOGO side effects
task.reading_goal: Read relogin and logout side effects tied to FLOGI. Cover same identity continue behavior, changed N_Port_ID/F_Port_Name/Fabric_Name implicit logout behavior, R_A_TOV wait, NOS/OLS consequences, and Table 148 effects of FLOGI/FDISC/LOGO on Permanent Port Name.
completion_criteria: Same identity relogin continue behavior is grounded.
Changed identity implicit logout plus R_A_TOV behavior is grounded.
Table 148 side effects are represented or explicitly scoped.
